đź’ˇKAWA4096 INTEL
=================
đź“ŚA new Ransomware Group emerged with Akira Themed DLS Site found
đź“ŚNo dedicated Victim Panel for contact
đź“ŚOnly 4GB data is leaked, but claimed as 53GB of a US Media Company on their DLS
đź“ŚVictim Names are masked, which is a similar approach adopted by RA World Group earlier
đź“Ś5 Victims are listed, 1 is from Germany đź‡©đź‡Ş and rest are from the đź‡şđź‡¸
đź“ŚFile Listing saved in same DLS, however data leak is stored in another TOR Domain Server
đź“ŚBoth TOR Domains are Vanity Domains as the Domain Name starts with "kawasa"
đź“ŚCamellia Encryption in Kawa Sample is not widely seen, previously seen on the Linux Variant of Akira Ransomware

DLS: kawasa2qo7345dt7ogxmx7qmn6z2hnwaoi3h5aeosupozkddqwp6lqqd.onion
File Server: kawasax2yghpkcxx5d5fegnjoucwxnjpxcxpfh2vjfx7drj66pnwl3ad.onion

Technical Details
=================
đź“ŚRansom Note: Restore-My-file-Kavva.txt
đź“ŚMutex: SAY_HI_2025
đź“ŚEncrypt Data using: Curve25519, RC4 PRGA, chaskey, blowfish, Salsa20 or ChaCha, Camellia
đź“ŚEncode Data using: XOR, Base64, ADD XOR SUB operations
đź“ŚEncrypt or Decrypt via WinCrypt
đź“ŚUses QuickLZ for Data Decompression
đź“ŚHash data using: murmur3, SHA224
đź“ŚCreate new key via CryptAcquireContext
đź“ŚAuthenticate HMAC
đź“ŚGenerate random numbers via WinAPI
